Coding Competition
Date: 5 September 2026
Time: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM
Venue: Computer Lab - Block C
Mode: Individual Participation
Maximum Participants: 100
Registration Deadline: 2 September 2026
About the Event:

The Coding Competition tests participants' programming and problem-solving skills. Students will solve algorithmic challenges within a fixed time limit. Languages such as C, C++, Java, and Python are allowed.
Event Rules:

• Individual participation only.
• Internet access is not allowed.
• Follow lab rules strictly.
• Decision of judges will be final.
